Home Getting Started API Reference

Getting Started

This guide walks you through installing the SDK, authenticating, and making your first API call.

Installation

Install the Python SDK using pip:

pip install exampledocs

Authentication

Create a client with your API token:

from exampledocs import Client

client = Client(api_key="YOUR_TOKEN")

Your First Request

List Users

Retrieve all users in your organization:

users = client.users.list()
for user in users:
    print(user.email)

Handle Errors

The SDK raises typed exceptions:

from exampledocs.errors import NotFoundError

try:
    user = client.users.get("invalid-id")
except NotFoundError:
    print("User not found")

Next Steps
